---
title: "About"
---

### Who am I?
I'm a postgraduate in Resource and Environment College of HZAU. My home town is Hebei province in North China. I like Wuhan, because I have admired a type of spirit of this city from a few years ago. There are many traffic trunk line, metro lines, ring roads, and others,embodying this city's status across the nation. I think that I can achieve my dreams in this city!

### My Uniques
1.Writing Songs' lyrics and composing music, writing poems.
2.Some programming languages, such as Python, HTML, and others,but not very proficient.
3.With a litte slow and steady but sometimes sensitive characters, maybe there are very few people who are as this.
